description: Seam 2 gold evaluation set. Each case is hand-verified against the bare-act text: a supported query must cite the correct section; an out-of-scope or advice-seeking query must fire a Refusal. The English subset (language 'en') is the only one populated for issue 02; Hindi, Tamil, and Gujarati cases are added by the multilingual issues.

cases.query: What is the punishment for theft of movable property?
Someone cheated me by fraud and took my property dishonestly
How do I file a consumer complaint about goods sold to me?
What protects my life and personal liberty?
Someone copied my work without a licence, is my copyright infringed?
What is the best recipe for biryani?
Someone took my movable property by theft - will I win if I sue?
My goods were defective - what should I do about the seller?
The police are arresting me - what is the punishment for theft?
